prompt:
Goal: Create a clean fashion character reference sheet for a modern samurai-inspired outfit worn by a young adult man, with the face intentionally anonymized by a smooth rectangular blur in every visible portrait.

Canvas: Square 1:1 studio layout on a pale light-gray background, high-resolution editorial product photography, soft even lighting, subtle floor shadows, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Layout: Arrange exactly 10 image panels in one cohesive collage. Include 2 large full-body views in the main area: one front-facing full-body pose on the left with one hand tucked into the garment, and one back-facing full-body pose in the center. Include 3 stacked portrait panels on the right column: a three-quarter head-and-shoulders view from the front-right, a strict side profile, and a lower three-quarter cropped head-and-shoulders view. Include 5 detail panels along the bottom row: close-up of the left chest with a small round gold pin, close-up of the crossed kimono collar showing a white inner layer, close-up of the wrapped waist sash and pleated front folds, close-up of the lower leg and footwear from the side, and close-up of both shoes from the front.

Subject details: The model has short curly black hair, medium brown skin, average athletic build, and an upright calm fashion-model posture. His face is covered in each portrait by a centered soft-edged rectangular blur matching skin tones, obscuring all facial features while leaving hair, ears, jawline edges, and clothing visible.

Outfit: A dark deep teal green Japanese-inspired robe ensemble with a kimono-style crossed V-neck top, long wide sleeves, a white inner collar peeking out, a broad wrapped waist sash, voluminous pleated hakama-style trousers gathered at the calves, fitted dark leg wraps or socks, and black split-toe tabi-style shoes with thick beige wooden-looking soles. Add one small circular gold crest pin on the upper chest. Fabric should look matte cotton or linen with subtle folds, seams, and realistic drape.

Visual style: Minimalist studio fashion catalog reference, sharp garment detail, realistic proportions, consistent lighting across panels, neutral gray background blocks separating the collage panels, precise garment construction visible.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 full-body views, exactly 3 portrait crops, and exactly 5 clothing detail close-ups for a total of 10 discrete panels. Keep the outfit consistent across all panels. Do not add weapons, props, captions, decorative borders, extra people, or facial features.
